name: Beef and Tequila Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Meat (boneless chuck, tip, or round)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Brown meat in batches until lightly charred on all sides.
2. Add flour and stir to coat the meat; cook 1 minute.
3. Add onions, celery, garlic, and tomatoes; saute until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in tequila, cilantro, salt, and beans; bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and cover.
5. Cook for 2 hours or until meat is tender, stirring occasionally. If stew looks too thick, add more tomato juice as needed.
6. Serve hot with rice if desired.
